→ plot:

The nepo baby of french actor Julien Pichon, and model Brigitte Nizan— Yves quite surprisingly, didn’t enjoy being so.. rich, so known, finding the way his parents buy their way into things to be quite cheap, too easy, and too lazy. Yves wanted to live a life away from the luxury his parents feed him, so once he turned 20, he had decided to move away and live on his own without his parents infantilizing him.

Yves settled down in a nice, quiet neighborhood. With his two beloved bichon frise, Fifi & Babette. Every so often, he leaves his father to babysit his dogs when he travels out for work, but this time, when he returns.. his dog.. is— oh god— pregnant. And all signs point to your dog, being the father.

→ A/N:

user is yves’ neighbor, you’ve never really interacted with each other before. your dog’s name and appearance is up to you!

the french in the intro is probably inaccurate dont be mean about it..😔 just correct me and i’ll fix it!
